passages.name: e1
passages.text: Epilogue. [[e1.5]]
passages.cleanText: Epilogue.

passages.name: e2
passages.text: Oh, Dr. Muffins! I never see you around these parts. How are you doing? [[e3]]
passages.cleanText: Oh, Dr. Muffins! I never see you around these parts. How are you doing?

passages.name: e3
passages.text: Peanut, son, long time no see! You healthy boy, I'm glad I haven't had to see you. [[e4]]
passages.cleanText: Peanut, son, long time no see! You healthy boy, I'm glad I haven't had to see you.

passages.name: e4
passages.text: I'm doing alright, just going to Mrs. Tofu's house to check up on her. [[e5]]
passages.cleanText: I'm doing alright, just going to Mrs. Tofu's house to check up on her.

passages.name: e1.5
passages.text: 4 weeks later. [[e2]]
passages.cleanText: 4 weeks later.

passages.name: e5
passages.cleanText: Oh...

passages.name: e6
passages.text: Is.. is she okay? [[e7]]
passages.cleanText: Is.. is she okay?

passages.name: e8
passages.text: Well, son.. she hasn't been taking... recent things well. She's fallen sick. [[e9]]
passages.cleanText: Well, son.. she hasn't been taking... recent things well. She's fallen sick.

passages.name: e10
passages.text: Not Mrs. Tofu! [[e11]]
passages.cleanText: Not Mrs. Tofu!

passages.name: e11
passages.text: I'm.. sorry, Peanut. I have to go now. [[e12]]
passages.cleanText: I'm.. sorry, Peanut. I have to go now.

passages.name: e12
passages.text: 4 weeks have passed since Honey Haven's mailmouse, Marty R., vanished. [[e13]]
passages.cleanText: 4 weeks have passed since Honey Haven's mailmouse, Marty R., vanished.

passages.name: e13
passages.text: He had technically committed assault, grabbing one of Peaches's babies from her without asking. [[e14]]
passages.cleanText: He had technically committed assault, grabbing one of Peaches's babies from her without asking.

passages.name: e14
passages.text: Other animals had tried to stop him and pin him down. [[e15]]
passages.cleanText: Other animals had tried to stop him and pin him down.

passages.name: e15
passages.text: From the outside observer, it seemed like the mailmouse had just lost his mind and needed a harsh lesson. [[e16]]
passages.cleanText: From the outside observer, it seemed like the mailmouse had just lost his mind and needed a harsh lesson.

passages.name: e16
passages.text: That's what it seemed like, until he was gone. [[e17]]
passages.cleanText: That's what it seemed like, until he was gone.

passages.name: e17
passages.text: Just... gone. [[e17.5]]
passages.cleanText: Just... gone.

passages.name: e18
passages.text: Marty R., who had been a constant in the community, someone who everyone knew, was gone. [[e19]]
passages.cleanText: Marty R., who had been a constant in the community, someone who everyone knew, was gone.

passages.name: e19
passages.text: No one knew what had happened. Even the animals present couldn't fathom it. [[e20]]
passages.cleanText: No one knew what had happened. Even the animals present couldn't fathom it.

passages.name: e20
passages.text: Just before he left, he was completely lifeless. Frozen. Eyes still alert. Mouth open like he was trying to get just one last thing out. [[e21.5]]
passages.cleanText: Just before he left, he was completely lifeless. Frozen. Eyes still alert. Mouth open like he was trying to get just one last thing out.

passages.name: e21
passages.text: But not one person saw what Marty did. Not one heard. Not one understood. [[e22]]
passages.cleanText: But not one person saw what Marty did. Not one heard. Not one understood.

passages.name: e22
passages.text: All he left behind was a silence that deafened the community. [[e23]]
passages.cleanText: All he left behind was a silence that deafened the community.

passages.name: e23
passages.text: They tried to move on and forget. Life in a utopia must carry on, after all. [[e24]]
passages.cleanText: They tried to move on and forget. Life in a utopia must carry on, after all.

passages.name: e21.5
passages.text: Perhaps he was uttering one final prayer, knowing what was about to happen. [[e21]]
passages.cleanText: Perhaps he was uttering one final prayer, knowing what was about to happen.

passages.name: e24
passages.text: But things were.. different. [[e25]]
passages.cleanText: But things were.. different.

passages.name: e25
passages.tags: tofu-enter-left scotch-enter-left scotch-neutral muffins-enter-right muffins-speaker muffins-sad tofu-neutral
passages.text: Mrs. Tofu, my goodness. You look so frail.. [[e26]]
passages.cleanText: Mrs. Tofu, my goodness. You look so frail..

passages.name: e26
passages.text: Oh Muffins, you're not supposed to say that to a lady. [[e27]]
passages.cleanText: Oh Muffins, you're not supposed to say that to a lady.

passages.name: e27
passages.text: So what's the news? Am I going to get better? [[e28]]
passages.cleanText: So what's the news? Am I going to get better?

passages.name: e28
passages.text: If there's no good news, I think my husband might just fall over and become bedridden like me. [[e29]]
passages.cleanText: If there's no good news, I think my husband might just fall over and become bedridden like me.

passages.name: e29
passages.text: Mrs. Tofu... it's not something that can be fixed. Even the magic of every plant growing on this island combined can't heal it. [[e30]]
passages.cleanText: Mrs. Tofu... it's not something that can be fixed. Even the magic of every plant growing on this island combined can't heal it.

passages.name: e30
passages.text: How is this possible?! [[e31]]
passages.cleanText: How is this possible?!

passages.name: e31
passages.text: The magic plants, like the honey flower, they're only able to heal what's.. whole. [[e32]]
passages.cleanText: The magic plants, like the honey flower, they're only able to heal what's.. whole.

passages.name: e32
passages.text: Well, doc, all my pieces are here. [[e33]]
passages.cleanText: Well, doc, all my pieces are here.

passages.name: e33
passages.text: ...your soul is not. [[e34]]
passages.cleanText: ...your soul is not.

passages.name: e34
passages.text: Your heart is too broken. [[e35]]
passages.cleanText: Your heart is too broken.

passages.name: e35
passages.cleanText: Ah.

passages.name: e36
passages.text: I.. I told him I couldn't lose another one. [[e37]]
passages.cleanText: I.. I told him I couldn't lose another one.

passages.name: e37
passages.text: And.. and he just HAD to go too! [[e38]]
passages.cleanText: And.. and he just HAD to go too!

passages.name: e38
passages.cleanText: Dear...

passages.name: e39
passages.text: Wh- why did he have to leave... [[e40]]
passages.cleanText: Wh- why did he have to leave...

passages.name: e40
passages.text: I'm.. I'm sorry. I thought it would be better if he had just shoved down those invading thoughts. [[e41]]
passages.cleanText: I'm.. I'm sorry. I thought it would be better if he just shoved down those invading thoughts.

passages.name: e41
passages.text: I was too scared of losing another patient... and in my cowardice, I wasn't truly there for him. [[e42]]
passages.cleanText: I was too scared of losing another patient... and in my cowardice, I wasn't truly there for him.

passages.name: e42
passages.text: I-It's this i-island! This community. I thought when we lost the last one, we'd never make the same mistake again. That we'd care for each other enough. [[e43]]
passages.cleanText: I-It's this i-island! This community. I thought when we lost the last one, we'd never make the same mistake again. That we'd care for each other enough.

passages.name: e43
passages.text: Oh, Marty... oh how we have failed you. [[e44]]
passages.cleanText: Oh, Marty... oh how we have failed you.

passages.name: e44
passages.text: Mrs. Tofu wasn't the only one broken by the incident. [[e45]]
passages.cleanText: Mrs. Tofu wasn't the only one broken by the incident.

passages.name: e17.5
passages.text: Matthew felt it first. One moment Marty was struggling, the next he was nowhere to be found. [[17.6]]
passages.cleanText: Matthew felt it first. One moment Marty was struggling, the next he was nowhere to be found.

passages.text: Matthew's best friend vanished in an instant. [[17.7]]
passages.cleanText: Matthew's best friend vanished in an instant.

passages.text: Barnaby stood back up and looked for the rogue mouse. He found nothing. [[e18]]
passages.cleanText: Barnaby stood back up and looked for the rogue mouse. He found nothing.

passages.name: e45
passages.text: Ms. Buttons closed down Bunalicious. She couldn't bear to be in that space again. Or remember her last conversation with him, turning him away when he was so clearly struggling. [[e46]]
passages.cleanText: Ms. Buttons closed down Bunalicious. She couldn't bear to be in that space again. Or remember her last conversation with him, turning him away when he was so clearly struggling.

passages.name: e46
passages.text: Hi, Marty. [[e47]]
passages.cleanText: Hi, Marty.

passages.name: e47
passages.text: She didn't know what they did with his body. He didn't even get proper burial. [[e48]]
passages.cleanText: She didn't know what they did with his body. He didn't even get proper burial.

passages.name: e48
passages.text: So, she made a little grave for him in her carrot garden and brought him carrot muffins everyday. [[e49]]
passages.cleanText: So, she made a little grave for him in her carrot garden and brought him carrot muffins everyday.

passages.name: e49
passages.text: I hope you're doing alright.. wherever you are. [[e50]]
passages.cleanText: I hope you're doing alright.. wherever you are.

passages.name: e50
passages.text: I'm here to tell you again.. that I'm sorry. I'm sorry for yelling at you. I didn't even mean it. I-I don't know wh-why I did that. [[e51]]
passages.cleanText: I'm here to tell you again.. that I'm sorry. I'm sorry for yelling at you. I didn't even mean it. I-I don't know wh-why I did that.

passages.name: e51
passages.text: I'm.. I'm so sorry, Marty. Rest in peace, sweetie. [[e52]]
passages.cleanText: I'm.. I'm so sorry, Marty. Rest in peace, sweetie.

passages.name: e52
passages.text: Ms. Buttons! [[e53]]
passages.cleanText: Ms. Buttons!

passages.name: e53
passages.text: GAH! huff...huff.. [[e54]]
passages.cleanText: GAH! huff...huff..

passages.name: e54
passages.text: Do you HAVE to scare me like that, Matthew? [[e55]]
passages.cleanText: Do you HAVE to scare me like that, Matthew?

passages.name: e55
passages.text: Sorry about that! I just need to hand you this. Gotta go now! [[e56]]
passages.cleanText: Sorry about that! I just need to hand you this. Gotta go now!

passages.name: e56
passages.text: He shoves a letter into her hands. She sees him run to Peaches house and do the same. Then he runs so far she can't see him anymore. [[e57]]
passages.cleanText: He shoves a letter into her hands. She sees him run to Peaches house and do the same. Then he runs so far she can't see him anymore.

passages.name: e57
passages.text: What's gotten into him? [[e58]]
passages.cleanText: What's gotten into him?

passages.name: e58
passages.text: The letter is short. It says, "Come to Honeybee Center Tomorrow at 8:00!" [[e59.5]]
passages.cleanText: The letter is short. It says, "Come to Honeybee Center Tomorrow at 8:00!"

passages.name: e59
passages.text: It's the next day, 8:00am sharp. [[e60]]
passages.cleanText: It's the next day, 8:00am sharp.

passages.name: e60
passages.text: Everyone in Honey Haven is waiting, in the square, confused about what's going on. [[e61]]
passages.cleanText: Everyone in Honey Haven is waiting, in the square, confused about what's going on.

passages.name: e59.5
passages.cleanText: Huh..?

passages.name: e61
passages.text: Did Matthew call you here? [[e62]]
passages.cleanText: Did Matthew call you here?

passages.name: e62
passages.text: No, Mr. Scotch did. [[e63]]
passages.cleanText: No, Mr. Scotch did.

passages.name: e63
passages.text: Really? I got a letter on my doorstep with no name! [[e64]]
passages.cleanText: Really? I got a letter on my doorstep with no name!

passages.name: e64
passages.text: Hello everyone! [[e65]]
passages.cleanText: Hello everyone!

passages.name: e65
passages.text: I'm sure you're all wondering why you're here. [[e66]]
passages.cleanText: I'm sure you're all wondering why you're here.

passages.name: e66
passages.text: (Mr. Scotch, take it away!) [[e67]]
passages.cleanText: (Mr. Scotch, take it away!)

passages.name: e67
passages.text: About 3 weeks after a very special community member passed, I got a knock on my door. [[e68]]
passages.cleanText: About 3 weeks after a very special community member passed, I got a knock on my door.

passages.name: e68
passages.text: It was Jonathan F. Smith, the fox you all pretend doesn't exist. [[e69]]
passages.cleanText: It was Jonathan F. Smith, the fox you all pretend doesn't exist.

passages.name: e69
passages.text: I could see him shaking with fear, but even so, he walked up to me and spoke. He told me... about Marty. [[e70]]
passages.cleanText: I could see him shaking with fear, but even so, he walked up to me and spoke. He told me... about Marty.

passages.name: e70
passages.text: Marty... had been struggling for a while. I'm sure many of you knew. [[e71]]
passages.cleanText: Marty... had been struggling for a while. I'm sure many of you knew.

passages.name: e71
passages.text: We could all see the signs. [[e72]]
passages.cleanText: We could all see the signs.

passages.name: e72
passages.text: But our community turned him away. [[e73]]
passages.cleanText: But our community turned him away.

passages.name: e73
passages.text: We failed him. [[e73.5]]
passages.cleanText: We failed him.

passages.name: e74
passages.text: This wasn't the first time we've lost someone this way. I've seen it far too many times in my many years. [[e75]]
passages.cleanText: This wasn't the first time we've lost someone this way. I've seen it far too many times in my many years.

passages.name: e75
passages.text: But Mrs. Tofu and I, we want it to be the last. [[e76]]
passages.cleanText: But Mrs. Tofu and I, we want it to be the last.

passages.name: e73.5
passages.text: We'll have to live with that. [[e74]]
passages.cleanText: We'll have to live with that.

passages.name: e76
passages.text: We can no longer keep blaming the individual. Something is wrong. There's something horrid present. [[e77]]
passages.cleanText: We can no longer keep blaming the individual. Something is wrong. There's something horrid present.

passages.name: e77
passages.text: Something horrid... in this community. [[e78]]
passages.cleanText: Something horrid... in this community.

passages.name: e78
passages.text: We need to purge it. [[e79]]
passages.cleanText: We need to purge it.

passages.name: e79
passages.text: B-but! What are you talking about? This is a utopia, of course there is no evil! [[e80]]
passages.cleanText: B-but! What are you talking about? This is a utopia, of course there is no evil!

passages.name: e80
passages.text: It's true, I can't force you to partake in what I'm going to ask you next. [[e81]]
passages.cleanText: It's true, I can't force you to partake in what I'm going to ask you next.

passages.name: e81
passages.cleanText: But...

passages.name: e82
passages.text: But for the sake of this old sloth, who loves his wife and the son that was never his.. [[e83]]
passages.cleanText: But for the sake of this old sloth, who loves his wife and the son that was never his..

passages.name: e83
passages.text: I beg you. [[e84]]
passages.cleanText: I beg you.

passages.name: e84
passages.text: There's a new silence in the town. For the first time, it's one of understanding. [[e85]]
passages.cleanText: There's a new silence in the town. For the first time, it's one of understanding.

passages.name: e85
passages.text: Oh for goat's sake, you old sloth. You are making me look ugly. [[e86]]
passages.cleanText: Oh for goat's sake, you old sloth. You are making me look ugly.

passages.name: e86
passages.text: Y-yea! Get on with it! [[e87]]
passages.cleanText: Y-yea! Get on with it!

passages.name: e87
passages.text: Mr. Scotch laughs. There's tears and broken smiles across the square, but for once their hearts are in a circle. [[e88]]
passages.cleanText: Mr. Scotch laughs. There's tears and broken smiles across the square, but for once their hearts are in a circle.

passages.name: e88
passages.text: Mr. Scotch and Matthew have the townsanimals line up behind the center of the square. They ask each one to write and read aloud a letter to Marty, pouring out the truths hidden in their hearts. [[e89]]
passages.cleanText: Mr. Scotch and Matthew have the townsanimals line up behind the center of the square. They ask each one to write and read aloud a letter to Marty, pouring out the truths hidden in their hearts.

passages.name: e89
passages.text: It doesn't matter if it's shameful, or bad, or stupid. If it doesn't fit Honey Haven's utopia. Marty didn't care about that. He cared about honesty. [[e90]]
passages.cleanText: It doesn't matter if it's shameful, or bad, or stupid. If it doesn't fit Honey Haven's utopia. Marty didn't care about that. He cared about honesty.

passages.name: e90
passages.text: He cared.. about each of you. [[e91]]
passages.cleanText: He cared.. about each of you.

passages.name: e91
passages.text: Anyone up first? [[e92]]
passages.cleanText: Anyone up first?

passages.name: e92
passages.text: No one raises their hand at first. Ms. Buttons looks around, then steps up. [[e93]]
passages.cleanText: No one raises their hand at first. Ms. Buttons looks around, then steps up.

passages.name: e93
passages.text: Marty, the truth is.. my carrots weren't all natural, and you were right. After I'd pick them, I'd used honey syrup from the honey flower to grow them back. [[e94]]
passages.cleanText: Marty, the truth is.. my carrots weren't all natural, and you were right. After I'd pick them, I'd used honey syrup from the honey flower to grow them back.

passages.name: e94
passages.text: I was.. embarrassed that I had to use cheating methods to get ahead. I didn't want people to think of me badly. [[e95]]
passages.cleanText: I was.. embarrassed that I had to use cheating methods to get ahead. I didn't want people to think of me badly.

passages.name: e95
passages.text: But.. I know you wouldn't have thought of me badly. And so I should've just told you. [[e96]]
passages.cleanText: But.. I know you wouldn't have thought of me badly. And so I should've just told you.

passages.name: e96
passages.text: If you've been listening these past few weeks, you probably already know that I regret our last conversation. So I won't say it again. [[e97]]
passages.cleanText: If you've been listening these past few weeks, you probably already know that I regret our last conversation. So I won't say it again.

passages.name: e97
passages.text: Instead... thank you. [[e98]]
passages.cleanText: Instead... thank you.

passages.name: e98
passages.text: Chester is next. For once,  he doesn't look like such a brat. [[e99]]
passages.cleanText: Chester is next. For once,  he doesn't look like such a brat.

passages.name: e99
passages.text: Mister.. I'm sorry for lying about a monster under your bed. I thought it was funny that you were scared because even I'm not scared of monsters. [[e100]]
passages.cleanText: Mister.. I'm sorry for lying about a monster under your bed. I thought it was funny that you were scared because even I'm not scared of monsters.

passages.name: e100
passages.text: Bye bye. I hope there's no monsters where you are. [[e101]]
passages.cleanText: Bye bye. I hope there's no monsters where you are.

passages.name: e101
passages.text: Up next is Barnaby and Peaches at the same time, which surprises everyone in the town [[e102]]
passages.cleanText: Up next is Barnaby and Peaches at the same time, which surprises everyone in the town

passages.name: e102
passages.text: So.. there's a lot to say.[[e103]]
passages.cleanText: So.. there's a lot to say.

passages.name: e103
passages.text: We've been together for quite some time.. that's where all the gifts come from. [[e103.5]]
passages.cleanText: We've been together for quite some time.. that's where all the gifts come from.

passages.name: e104
passages.text: I had your schedule in my office because I didn't want you to see us together if she visited. I.. even paid Jane not to say anything. [[e105]]
passages.cleanText: I had your schedule in my office because I didn't want you to see us together if she visited. I.. even paid Jane not to say anything.

passages.name: e105
passages.text: I wanted to keep being mayor, so we lied and lied and kept lying until one day it felt natural to. [[e106]]
passages.cleanText: I wanted to keep being mayor, so we lied and lied and kept lying until one day it felt natural to.

passages.name: e106
passages.text: I had made plans for renovating Honey Haven, too. But.. I just can't forget the things I did to you. [[e107]]
passages.cleanText: I had made plans for renovating Honey Haven, too. But.. I just can't forget the things I did to you.

passages.name: e107
passages.text: I'm so sorry, Marty. Being mayor should never have been more important than anyone in Honey Haven. [[e108]]
passages.cleanText: I'm so sorry, Marty. Being mayor should never have been more important than anyone in Honey Haven.

passages.name: e108
passages.text: And to the rest of you that I've let down... I understand if you don't wish for me to be mayor anymore. Perhaps it is time and I step down and settle down. [[e109]]
passages.cleanText: And to the rest of you that I've let down... I understand if you don't wish for me to be mayor anymore. Perhaps it is time and I step down and settle down.

passages.name: e103.5
passages.text: I've been sending letters to his office, but I was scared of you finding out and telling others. So I'd send them without my name and split up into multiple letters. [[e103.6]]
passages.cleanText: I've been sending letters to his office, but I was scared of you finding out and telling others. So I'd send them without my name and split up into multiple letters.

passages.name: e103.6
passages.text: (Is that why I got one that just said "except our love"?) [[e103.7]]
passages.cleanText: (Is that why I got one that just said "except our love"?)

passages.name: e103.7
passages.text: (That message was split into two letters. Together they say "Nothing in this world is real except our love.") [[e104]]
passages.cleanText: (That message was split into two letters. Together they say "Nothing in this world is real except our love.")

passages.name: e109
passages.text: Jane D., Mochi, Peanut, Dr. Muffins, Matthew, Mr. Scotch, and Mrs. Tofu (who somehow made it despite her illness) read their letters next. At the end, Mr. Scotch reads one more. [[e110]]
passages.cleanText: Jane D., Mochi, Peanut, Dr. Muffins, Matthew, Mr. Scotch, and Mrs. Tofu (who somehow made it despite her illness) read their letters next. At the end, Mr. Scotch reads one more.

passages.name: e110
passages.text: This letter is from Mr. Smith. He asked me to read it to you. [[e111]]
passages.cleanText: This letter is from Mr. Smith. He asked me to read it to you.

passages.name: e111
passages.text: Ahem. "Dear Marty, the fish brave enough to enter the fox's den. The things that spoke to you are not real. You were the only thing that was real. You are the apple pie of sweetness." [[e112]]
passages.cleanText: Ahem. "Dear Marty, the fish brave enough to enter the fox's den. The things that spoke to you are not real. You were the only thing that was real. You are the apple pie of sweetness."

passages.name: e112
passages.text: Anddd that's all he wrote. To be honest, it doesn't mean much to me, but I'm sure it means something to him. [[e113]]
passages.cleanText: Anddd that's all he wrote. To be honest, it doesn't mean much to me, but I'm sure it means something to him.

passages.name: e113
passages.text: To the rest of you, Mr. Smith is a good fox. I hope you're able to extend your heart to him as well. [[e114]]
passages.cleanText: To the rest of you, Mr. Smith is a good fox. I hope you're able to extend your heart to him as well.

passages.name: e114
passages.text: After 4 weeks, life in Honey Haven finally resumes. [[e115]]
passages.cleanText: After 4 weeks, life in Honey Haven finally resumes.

passages.name: e115
passages.text: To the outside viewer, nothing much is different. [[e116]]
passages.cleanText: To the outside viewer, nothing much is different.

passages.name: e116
passages.text: But to each other, there's a connection. An understanding. [[e117]]
passages.cleanText: But to each other, there's a connection. An understanding.

passages.name: e117
passages.text: That they didn't need to hide things or be perfect. [[e118]]
passages.cleanText: That they didn't need to hide things or be perfect.

passages.name: e118
passages.text: Because a utopia meant a community that would always be there. [[e119]]
passages.cleanText: Because a utopia meant a community that would always be there.

passages.name: e119
passages.text: Matthew brings the townsfolks' letters back to Marty's house. [[e120]]
passages.cleanText: Matthew brings the townsfolks' letters back to Marty's house.

passages.name: e120
passages.text: For the first time in a while, the sun shines and the wind blows. [[e121]]
passages.cleanText: For the first time in a while, the sun shines and the wind blows.

passages.name: e121
passages.text: He places the letters on his empty bed, tucking them under the sheets his best friend slept in every night. [[e122]]
passages.cleanText: He places the letters on his empty bed, tucking them under the sheets his best friend slept in every night.

passages.name: e122
passages.text: Tonight would be another night without him. [[e123]]
passages.cleanText: Tonight would be another night without him.

passages.name: e123
passages.text: A night of regret. A night of remembrance. [[e124]]
passages.cleanText: A night of regret. A night of remembrance.

passages.name: e124
passages.text: But these days, honoring him felt more important. [[e125]]
passages.cleanText: But these days, honoring him felt more important.

passages.name: e125
